---
title: "Wenxuan Jiang"
about: 
  template: solana
  image: images/headshot.jpeg
  links: 
    - icon: linkedin
      text: LinkedIn
      href: https://www.linkedin.com/in/wenxuan-jiang/
    - icon: envelope-at-fill
      text: Email
      href: mailto:wenxuan.jiang@psu.edu
---

Hi! I am Wenxuan Jiang, a third-year PhD student in the [Department of Statistics](https://science.psu.edu/stat) at [Penn State](https://www.psu.edu), where I am fortuante to be advised by [Prof. Murali Haran](https://sites.psu.edu/muraliharan/). My research interests include simulation-based inference, particularlly its applications to infectious disease models, statistical computing, and intractable likelihood problems.

Previously, I earned my bachelor's degree in Mathematics from [UT Austin](https://www.utexas.edu), where I had some wonderful time mentored by Dhivya Arassapan and Dr. Jeanne Kowalski.
